attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT TMP.RTV_ID	,
TMP.ORDER_NUMBER	,
TMP.SHIP_SET_NUMBER	,
TMP.CARTON_NUMBER	,
TMP.DELIVERY_ID	,
TMP.SHIP_TO_COUNTRY	,
TMP.OPERATING_UNIT	,
TMP.ORDER_TYPE	,
TMP.STATUS	,
TMP.SLC_INT_SLC_CODE	,
TMP.SLC_INT_SLC_NAME	,
TMP.SHIP_PREFERENCE	,
TMP.ERROR_MESSAGE	,
TMP.SHIP_TO	,
TMP.SHIP_FROM	,
TMP.REASON_CODE	,
TMP.TELESERVICE_CASE	,
TMP.HOLD_STATUS	,
TMP.ROUTE_CODE	,
TMP.LAST_UPDATED_BY	,
TMP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE	,
TMP.CREATED_BY	,
TMP.CREATION_DATE	,
TMP.REQUEST_ID	,
TMP.PROGRAM_ID	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE1	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE2	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE3	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE4	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE5	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE6	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE7	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE8	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE9	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE10	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE11	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE12	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE13	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE14	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE15	,
TMP.CANCEL_HOLD_OVERRIDE	,
TMP.ORG_NAME	,
'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME,
TMP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
TMP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ,
TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 (SELECT RTV_ID	,
ORDER_NUMBER	,
SHIP_SET_NUMBER	,
CARTON_NUMBER	,
DELIVERY_ID	,
SHIP_TO_COUNTRY	,
OPERATING_UNIT	,
ORDER_TYPE	,
STATUS	,
SLC_INT_SLC_CODE	,
SLC_INT_SLC_NAME	,
SHIP_PREFERENCE	,
ERROR_MESSAGE	,
SHIP_TO	,
SHIP_FROM	,
REASON_CODE	,
TELESERVICE_CASE	,
HOLD_STATUS	,
ROUTE_CODE	,
LAST_UPDATED_BY	,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE	,
CREATED_BY	,
CREATION_DATE	,
REQUEST_ID	,
PROGRAM_ID	,
ATTRIBUTE1	,
ATTRIBUTE2	,
ATTRIBUTE3	,
ATTRIBUTE4	,
ATTRIBUTE5	,
ATTRIBUTE6	,
ATTRIBUTE7	,
ATTRIBUTE8	,
ATTRIBUTE9	,
ATTRIBUTE10	,
ATTRIBUTE11	,
ATTRIBUTE12	,
ATTRIBUTE13	,
ATTRIBUTE14	,
ATTRIBUTE15	,
CANCEL_HOLD_OVERRIDE	,
ORG_NAME	,
SOURCE_DML_TYPE, TRAIL_FILE_NAME,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE
WHERE  SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <=  '$$EndLastExtractDate' AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE<>'DELETE') TMP 
QUALIFY RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY TMP.ORDER_NUMBER,TMP.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,TMP.CARTON_NUMBER   ORDER BY TMP.ORDER_NUMBER,TMP.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,TMP.CARTON_NUMBER, TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC ) = 1
